properties.label: Full Life Potion
properties.description: Siege infirmary draught thick enough to knit torn organs if you can stomach the taste.

properties.label: Full Mana Potion
properties.description: Ceremonial brew for all-night rituals; burnt parchment flavor that keeps casters lucid for days.

properties.label: Greater Life Potion
properties.description: Steeped with relic dust carried from the catacombs, it burns away Pritscher rot as it heals.

properties.label: Greater Mana Potion
properties.description: Cut with shards from OctoBogz crystals to flood nerves with cold focus.

properties.label: Lesser Life Potion
properties.description: Marsh-thistle tonic that keeps scouts upright long enough to limp back to town.

properties.label: Lesser Mana Potion
properties.description: Thin blue draught brewed from river fungus, good for a single rune-spark.

properties.label: Life Potion
properties.description: Standard chapel mixture of saint-ash and nettle that scalds while it stitches flesh.

properties.label: Mana Potion
properties.description: Balanced infusion of incense tar and void-salt for steady spellcasting along the ramparts.

properties.label: Max Life Potion
properties.description: Reserved for Eradicator captains; tar-thick medicine that feels like swallowing molten iron.

properties.label: Max Mana Potion
properties.description: Rarest azure syrup from Beren's reliquary, potent enough to shatter cult wards.
